revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-330

A flexible layer of fascines, geotextiles, or other material used to reinforce a waterlogged soil, or used on a river or sea bed to prevent scour, overlaid with rocks and stones to retain it in position.

{{IALAFooter}}
